Linux Enumeration

Linux enumeration focuses on collecting host, user, privilege, service, network, filesystem, and configuration details to identify misconfigurations and potential privilege escalation paths.

Enumeration

  • System and kernel information
  • Current user, groups, and sudo privileges
  • Local users and readable home directories
  • Network interfaces, routes, and listening services
  • Running processes and installed packages
  • Cron jobs, timers, and startup scripts
  • SUID/SGID binaries and writable paths
